MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-10-2020 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-13-2019 Set For Trial On Feb-03-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Apr-08-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Elvira Pineda Petitioner in Propria Persona, 415-992-1083. Cindy Pineda is present, helping her mother.

Hearing is held. The Court questioned Elvira is she provided notice to opposing counsel. Cinday stated that they were unable to reach the other sides attorney by phone, that the attorney is out on maternity leave and they sent the papers to her office. The Court clarified its tentative ruling, that all parties who have interest in the case should be involved and that they are issues raised in the demurrer that need to be addressed.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTs BANK OF AMERICA N.A and RECONTRUST COMPANY N.A.'s Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is GRANTED with leave to amend for Plaintiff to address all issues raised by demurrer in good faith. Plaintiff shall have 30 days from notice of entry of order to file an amended complaint. The Court notes that there may be a necessary party in this action, trustee of the special needs trust, title owner of the property prior to foreclosure. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC3.1312(b). Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not reported (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Mar-25-2019 Continued To Apr-08-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Elvia Pineda, 415.533.0884 Plaintiff/Opposing party on her pwn behalf.
No other appearances

Discussed. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA N.A, RECONTRUST COMPANY'S Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities is continued to April 8, 2019 on Court's own motion. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
